_comment: Per-phase config for lanes. Two lanes today: forge (specâ†’planâ†’implâ†’review, builds code from a backlog item) and shape (single phase, updates .lanes/* docs from user intent). Chain order per lane is fixed in code; this file tunes the knobs. Read at runtime from the mounted repo, so edits take effect on the next `lanes` run â€” no image rebuild. model: opus|sonnet|haiku. skill/skills: the skill(s) the phase uses (null/absent = no skill loaded). maxTurns/maxThinkingTokens: null = no limit; positive integer = cap. maxTurns below are runaway guards sized ~3-4x a normal run â€” high enough to never trip healthy work, finite enough to stop a loop. Hitting the cap ends the phase non-success â†’ recorded `blocked`, chain stops. Bump them for very large repos.
